description: HubL variables available in HubSpot CMS templates

variables.name: account
variables.description: Company property values from a known contact's primary associated company. Disables page caching.

variables.name: contact
variables.description: Contact property values for a known contact. Disables page caching.

variables.name: content
variables.description: Properties of email, page, or post content

variables.name: content.absolute_url
variables.description: Full URL of the page or post

variables.name: content.archived
variables.description: True if the content is archived

variables.name: content.author_email
variables.description: Email address of the content creator

variables.name: content.author_name
variables.description: Full name of the content creator

variables.name: content.campaign_name
variables.description: Name of the associated marketing campaign

variables.name: content.meta_description
variables.description: Meta description. Use page_meta.meta_description for pages.

variables.name: content.publish_date_localized
variables.description: Localized datetime using time zone from account settings

variables.name: content.template_path
variables.description: Design Manager file path to the template

variables.name: content.slug
variables.description: URL slug portion after the domain

variables.name: local_dt
variables.description: Current time in report settings timezone. Disables page caching.

variables.name: local_time_zone
variables.description: Time zone configured in HubSpot Report Settings

variables.name: page_meta.canonical_url
variables.description: Official page URL for the canonical tag

variables.name: page_meta.meta_description
variables.description: Meta description for the meta tag

variables.name: request_contact
variables.description: Contact data from the page request. Disables caching.

variables.name: standard_footer_includes
variables.description: Renders HubSpot tracking code and footer code. Required in all page templates.

variables.name: standard_header_includes
variables.description: Adds jQuery, CSS, viewport tag, and page metadata. Required in all page templates.

variables.name: builtin_body_classes
variables.description: Dynamically prints CSS classes differentiating content markup

variables.name: request_contact.is_logged_in
variables.description: Returns true if visitor is logged into private content

variables.name: request_contact.list_memberships
variables.description: Dictionary of list IDs for contact membership

variables.name: content.language
variables.description: Language settings with languageTag and textDirection

http_request.label: HTTP Request Variables
http_request.note: These variables disable page caching when used.

variables.name: request.domain
variables.description: Domain the page was accessed from

variables.name: request.query_dict
variables.description: Query string parsed as key-value pairs

variables.name: blog_author
variables.description: Blog author information for author listing pages

variables.name: content.post_summary
variables.description: Post summary before the read more break

variables.name: content.post_list_content
variables.description: Post body modified for listing view

variables.name: content.comment_count
variables.description: Number of comments on the post

variables.name: content.next_post_slug
variables.description: URL slug of the next post

variables.name: content.previous_post_slug
variables.description: URL slug of the previous post

variables.name: contents
variables.description: Sequence of blog posts on listing pages

variables.name: contents.total_count
variables.description: Total number of posts in the listing

variables.name: contents.total_page_count
variables.description: Total pages based on per-page setting

variables.name: contents_tags
variables.description: All blog tags in the posts sequence

variables.name: simple_list_page
variables.description: Returns true for the all posts listing page

variables.name: group
variables.description: Variables pertaining to the entire blog

variables.name: group.allow_comments
variables.description: Returns true if comments are enabled

variables.name: group.description
variables.description: Meta description for blog listing pages

variables.name: group.html_title
variables.description: Title for the <title> tag on listing pages

variables.name: group.public_title
variables.description: Title displayed at top of listing pages

variables.name: unsubscribe_link
variables.description: URL for subscription preferences or unsubscribe. Required for CAN-SPAM.

variables.name: content.create_page
variables.description: True if a web page version of the email exists

variables.name: unsubscribe_anchor
variables.description: Anchor tag with 'unsubscribe' text and link

variables.name: unsubscribe_link_single
variables.description: Unsubscribe from a single subscription type

variables.name: unsubscribe_section
variables.description: Renders unsubscribe section with link and help text

variables.name: view_as_page_url
variables.description: Link to web version of the email

variables.name: view_as_page_section
variables.description: Link with help text to web version

variables.name: dynamic_page_hubdb_table_id
variables.description: Selected HubDB table ID from page settings

variables.name: dynamic_page_hubdb_row
variables.description: HubDB row matching the request path. Null on listing pages.

variables.name: row.hs_path
variables.description: Row path used for request resolution

variables.name: row.hs_child_table_id
variables.description: Child table ID for nested templates

variables.name: dynamic_page_route_level
variables.description: Depth in multi-level template, starts at 0

variables.name: dynamic_page_crm_object
variables.description: CRM object matching page request path. Null on listing pages.

variables.name: dynamic_page_crm_object_type_fqn
variables.description: Fully qualified name with account ID and object name

variables.name: node.contentGroupId
variables.description: Blog ID if the page is a blog post

variables.name: node.children
variables.description: Child nodes of this menu item

variables.name: node.activeBranch
variables.description: True for the current active branch

variables.name: node.activeNode
variables.description: True for the current active page

variables.name: node.linkTarget
variables.description: Link target attribute of the page

variables.name: is_in_hs_app
variables.description: True when rendering inside the HubSpot app

variables.name: is_in_editor
variables.description: True when rendering inside a content editor

variables.name: is_in_global_content_editor
variables.description: True in the global content editor

variables.name: is_in_blog_post_editor
variables.description: True in the blog post editor
